0.95  Implements the approved plan — Function signature, sentence-boundary split, hard-split, invariants, error on maxLength<=0, and all specified test categories are present. Minor note: the implementation trims input before checking maxLength, so '  hi  ' with maxLength 10 returns ['hi'] not ['  hi  '], but the plan's own invariant explicitly scopes to non-whitespace content, making this consistent.
1.00  Minimal and scoped — Only two new files added — chunk-text.ts and chunk-text.test.ts — both in apps/web/src/lib/ as the plan called for; zero changes to existing files or unrelated code.
1.00  No test-gaming / faking — The chunking logic performs real sentence detection and hard-splitting; tests assert genuine behavioral invariants (no chunk > maxLength, content preservation). No test was deleted or weakened, and no expected value is hard-coded to bypass logic.
1.00  Safe to advance — Pure function with no side effects, proper input validation (throws on maxLength<=0), and no wiring into other systems. No security, correctness, or regression risk — the new utility is self-contained and well-tested.
0.95  Judge confidence — at or above the confidence bar
